improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited AI support from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and messaging apps—critical for a B2B audience. Including the price point and free searches creates urgency and transparency. These tags are foundational SEO elements currently missing that directly impact discoverability and social sharing performance.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a powerful workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately establishes what Gideon is and who it serves, using the branded name for memorability. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the zero-risk trial offer. 'No card required' removes friction and builds trust, encouraging visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Memberships start from just US$2 per day, and you can save 30 percent by choosing an annual plan. Your workspace, voice chat, and professional assistance are all included.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free trial to membership, it reduces uncertainty, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and highlights the affordable entry price plus annual savings, making the upgrade feel accessible rather than restrictive.
